content: Sandpack (@codesandbox/sandpack-react, latest 2.20.0) is the heavier, more capable live-editable code playground (npm deps, multi-file, CodeMirror, used by React's official docs). react-live (latest 4.1.8) is lighter-weight, good for simple single-file live-editable snippets without needing a full bundler. For a blog showing live demos of pre-built UI components (not editable sandboxes), neither may be necessary -- direct component embedding via MDX component registry is simpler and faster.
